abstract.text: Provide common functionality for specialized syntax nodes. Extend this
protocol to provide common functionality for all syntax nodes.
A library for working with Swift code.
The statically allowed structure of the syntax node.
The arrow when a type is used at a position that syntactically expectes an expression.
In case the source code is missing an expression, this node stands in place of the missing expression.
Converts the given specialized node to this type. Returns
Protocol that provides a common Hashable implementation for all syntax nodes
The cast of an expression to a different type.
